name: runtime_block
description: Per-block runtime event — one row per (slot, block_id) emitted at slot freeze (after bank hashing, before voting/rooting).  Carries the deterministic block-level snapshot (counts, fees, capitalization, the four bank-hash inputs) plus separate Nested lists of accounts modified by non-transaction paths during slot replay (sysvar refresh, vote-account reward credits, stake-account PER partition payouts).  Per-transaction account changes are NOT here; they live on events.runtime_txn.

block_id.description: Solana fork-choice block id (root of the last FEC set) (32 bytes).  Distinguishes equivocating blocks at the same slot — primary key is (slot, block_id).

parent_block_id.description: Parent's block_id (32 bytes); lets you walk the fork tree

epoch.description: Epoch this slot belongs to (denormalized from slot)

block_produced.description: 1 if a block was produced at this slot, 0 if skipped

bank_hash.description: Bank hash of this slot (32 bytes).  Also available in events.bank_hash.

prev_bank_hash.description: Bank hash of the parent slot (32 bytes)

accounts_lt_hash_checksum.description: Accounts lt-hash checksum, blake3 of the accounts lthash (32 bytes)

poh_hash.description: Proof-of-history hash at the end of the slot (32 bytes)

blockhash.description: Blockhash transactions reference for this slot (32 bytes)

num_failed_txns.description: Transactions that committed with an error (or were cancelled)

num_signatures.description: Total signatures processed in the block (matches events.bank_hash.signature_cnt)

ticks_in_block.description: Tick entries in the block (= ticks_per_slot for a full block)

tick_height.description: Cumulative tick height at the end of this slot

fees_collected.description: Total fees collected in this block (lamports)

priority_fees_total.description: Total priority fees paid in this block (lamports)

compute_units_consumed.description: Sum of compute units consumed across all txns in this block

capitalization.description: Bank capitalization at end of slot (total supply, same value as bank->f.capitalization)

total_activating_stake.description: Stake activating during this slot's epoch

total_deactivating_stake.description: Stake deactivating during this slot's epoch

total_epoch_stake.description: Total staked to active vote accounts

transaction_count.description: Cumulative-since-genesis transaction count — strong cross-client determinism canary

fees_burned.description: Half of execution_fees, burned at fee settlement (lamports).  Computed in fd_runtime_settle_fees.

leader_fee_reward.description: Lamports credited to the leader account at fee settlement (= priority_fees + execution_fees - fees_burned).  Cross-check by joining fee_reward_diffs (leader account post-credit).

sysvar_diffs.description: Sysvar account updates this slot (Clock, SlotHashes, RecentBlockhashes, Rent, EpochSchedule, EpochRewards, StakeHistory, ...).

owner.description: Owner program after the update (32 bytes)

data_sz.description: Account data size in bytes after the update

executable.description: 1 if account is executable after the update, 0 otherwise

vote_reward_diffs.description: Vote-account credits at slot 0 of a new epoch (the vote commission cut of the prior epoch's rewards).  Empty outside the first slot of an epoch.

owner.description: Owner program (vote program) after the update (32 bytes)

data_sz.description: Account data size in bytes after the update

stake_reward_diffs.description: Stake-account credits during the partitioned-epoch-rewards (PER) window — one partition per slot starting at slot 1 of a new epoch.  Empty outside the PER window.

owner.description: Owner program (stake program) after the update (32 bytes)

data_sz.description: Account data size in bytes after the update

fee_reward_diffs.description: Leader's account state after the fee-reward credit at slot freeze.  Typically one entry per row (the slot's leader).

owner.description: Owner program after the credit (32 bytes)

lamports.description: Leader account lamports after the fee reward credit

other_diffs.description: Catch-all for non-txn account updates that don't fit sysvar / vote_reward / stake_reward / fee_reward — BPF migrations, manual slot-history sysvar opens, etc.  Always populated by log_account_change when no other hint applies.

owner.description: Owner program after the update (32 bytes)

fec_merkle_roots.description: Every FEC merkle root the bank saw while assembling this block, in arrival order.  Final entry equals block_id.  Join runtime_txn.block_id against this list to recover canonical block grouping (runtime_txn.block_id is an intermediate FEC mr stamped at dispatch time).
